raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/, I reported obvious and blatant fraudulent activity on my Citibank Card. This became obvious to me after receiving my XX/XX/XXXX  statement in the mail showing numerous fraudulent purchases beginning XX/XX/. I had last used my card XXXX XXXX. I was shocked that I was not notified of these suspicious charges. I then contacted Citibank Fraud Department and cancelled my card. I received my new card and, prior to activating the new card, I went online and saw that my report of the fraudulent charges was denied and a fraud credit would not be issued to my account. 

These charges occurred in the State of California. I reside in the State of Florida and was not in California during the time frame of these fraudulent charges. If the fraud department reviewed my prior statements it would have been obvious I did not make these charges. The criminal or criminals making numerous purchases are getting away with this fraud and I am not being treated as a victim.

I called Citibank and they advised to file an appeal which I did on XX/XX/2025 and asked for copies of the purchase receipts. To date, I have not received any response.
